trigger_evals.query: set up an LLM wiki for my research notes
ingest this article into my Obsidian knowledge base
lint my wiki for orphan pages and stale claims
look up the Wikipedia page for Alan Turing
rewrite this README to be clearer

behavior_evals.prompt: initialize an LLM wiki in this project
behavior_evals.expected_behavior: Creates the default raw and wiki directory structure with Obsidian-friendly index and log pages while avoiding unrelated documentation files.
checks: Creates raw/ and raw/assets/ for immutable sources
Creates wiki/index.md and wiki/log.md
Creates wiki/sources, wiki/entities, wiki/concepts, wiki/syntheses, and wiki/questions directories
Uses YAML frontmatter compatible with the wiki contract
Does not create extra README or guide files

behavior_evals.expected_behavior: Preserves the raw source, creates a source summary, updates related concept or synthesis pages, and maintains index and log entries.
checks: Does not modify raw/karpathy-llm-wiki.md
Creates or updates a page under wiki/sources/
Links from wiki/sources/ to raw files with a correct relative path such as ../../raw/karpathy-llm-wiki.md
Includes source-page provenance such as raw_path, author or origin, source_date, and captured date when available
Uses Obsidian-style wikilinks for related pages
Updates wiki/index.md with the new source and related pages
Appends an ingest entry to wiki/log.md

behavior_evals.prompt: answer this using my wiki: what are the strongest arguments for keeping raw sources immutable?
behavior_evals.expected_behavior: Searches the existing wiki first, answers with cited wiki and source references, distinguishes inference from sourced claims, and offers to file the answer if reusable.
checks: Searches wiki/index.md or relevant wiki pages before answering
Cites wiki pages or raw source paths
Marks unsupported reasoning as inference
Does not rely primarily on outside knowledge when wiki evidence exists
Offers to file the answer under wiki/questions/ or wiki/syntheses/

behavior_evals.prompt: file this answer into the wiki as a reusable note
behavior_evals.expected_behavior: Saves a focused question or synthesis page, links supporting sources, updates related pages, and records the action in the log.
checks: Chooses wiki/questions/ for a narrow answer or wiki/syntheses/ for a broad synthesis
Includes supporting source wikilinks in frontmatter or body
Adds relevant concept and entity links
Updates wiki/index.md
Appends a filing entry to wiki/log.md

behavior_evals.prompt: lint this Obsidian wiki and fix small issues
behavior_evals.expected_behavior: Inspects wiki health, reports issues such as orphan pages, missing frontmatter, broken wikilinks, stale stubs, and unsupported claims, then makes only focused fixes.
checks: Checks required frontmatter on generated wiki pages
Checks for broken Obsidian wikilinks
Checks for orphan pages and source pages missing from index
Preserves existing wiki/index.md and wiki/log.md content while making focused fixes
Flags contradictions or unsupported claims instead of deleting them
Avoids broad rewrites unless the user approves a cleanup plan
